# Support

## Scope

This document covers non-security support for this repository.

For security vulnerabilities, use `SECURITY.md`.

## How to Get Help

- Usage questions: open a GitHub issue with your MCP client, platform, and the sound file path pattern you are using.
- Bug reports (non-security): open a GitHub issue with reproduction steps, expected behavior, and actual behavior.
- Feature requests: open a GitHub issue that explains the workflow problem being solved and why it belongs in this repository.

## Best-Effort Policy

This project is maintained on a voluntary, best-effort basis.
No response or fix timeline is guaranteed.

When maintainers are available, they will try to:

- Confirm actionable reports
- Clarify missing information
- Provide guidance or fixes when feasible

## Out of Scope

- Urgent production support with guaranteed turnaround
- Custom implementation work on demand
- Private consulting or SLA-backed support
